import io
import string

fn parse_two(_ s: String) -> Option<List<Int>>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut count = 0
  while count < 2 and i < n
    # skip whitespace
    while i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1000
      end
    end
    if i > n
      i = i - 1001
    end
    # read digits
    mut val = 0
    mut found = false
    while i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        found = true
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1000
      end
    end
    if i > n
      i = i - 1001
    end
    if found
      nums = [val]
      # can't push easily without list module; use list.push
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  None
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = y
    y = x % y
    x = t
  end
  x
end

fn read_int(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> List<Int>
  # returns [value, next_index, found]
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  # skip whitespace
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end
  mut val = 0
  mut found = 0
  mut reading = true
  while reading
    if i >= n
      reading = false
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        found = 1
        i = i + 1
      else
        reading = false
      end
    end
  end
  [val, i, found]
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let r1 = read_int(s, 0)
  let a = r1[0]
  let i1 = r1[1]
  let r2 = read_int(s, i1)
  let b = r2[0]
  let g = gcd(a, b)
  println("gcd=#{g}")
end
